subject: A Kor figure equipped with a glider harness of geometric wing-struts descends through a dark cave shaft
description: A small humanoid figure is shown in sharp descent through a vertical cave shaft, wearing or operating a glider apparatus with angular geometric wing-struts visible above them. The wings are made of rigid straight lines and panels in brown and white, decorated with rune-like geometric markings. Grappling lines or tethers trail from the figure. The cave walls are dark blue-purple and the image is lit from above by a narrow shaft of pale light. The figure's posture suggests controlled flight or a steep dive. The overall image is dark and dramatic, lit primarily by the shaft light from above.
foreground: Humanoid figure in geometric wing-glider apparatus mid-flight
background: Dark cave walls with narrow shaft of light from above
